descriptions.description: The 30ml Slim bottle brings a narrow, tall profile to one-ounce formats. Its 18-415 neck fits fine mist sprayers for perfume and fragrance mist. A distinctive shape for brands that want to stand out on shelf.
The 30ml Slim bottle brings a narrow, tall profile to one-ounce formats. Its 18-415 neck fits fine mist sprayers. A distinctive shape for brands that want to stand out on shelf.

A 50ml Slim bottle with an 18-415 neck built for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands choose this for a classic, decorative spray. The tall, slender silhouette works well for gift packaging.
A 50ml Slim bottle with an 18-415 neck built for vintage bulb sprayers. The tall, slender silhouette works well for gift packaging.

The 100ml Slim bottle with an 18-415 neck pairs with lotion pumps. Body lotion and hand cream brands use this capacity for a sleek, modern look. The narrow form factor fits easily in bags and on counters.
